privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Katsina Online Business (KOB) is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

collection.heading: 1. Information We Collect
collection.intro: We collect information you provide directly, including:
items: Account registration information (name, email, phone, address)
Payment and billing information
Product listings and descriptions
Communication and support records
Device and usage information

usage.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: Provide and improve our services
Process transactions and send confirmations
Send important updates and customer service messages
Prevent fraud and ensure security
Personalize your experience

protection.heading: 3. Data Protection
protection.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

sharing.heading: 4. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell, rent, or lease your personal information to third parties. We may share information with service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business, subject to strict confidentiality agreements.

retention.heading: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as long as necessary to provide you with our services. You can request deletion of your data at any time by contacting our support team.

rights.heading: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You can also opt-out of marketing communications at any time.

cookies.heading: 7. Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

contact.heading: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related questions, please contact us at:

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about KOB

items.question: How do I create an account?
items.answer: Click the 'Register' button and fill in your details. You'll receive a verification email to confirm your account.

items.question: How can I list a product?
items.answer: Navigate to your Seller Dashboard and click 'Add Product'. Fill in the details, upload images, and set your price. Your product will be live immediately.

items.question: Is there a fee to list products?
items.answer: We offer free product listings for verified sellers. Check our Verified Sellers Program for special benefits.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: We support secure payments through our payment gateway. All transactions are protected, and funds are released after order confirmation.

items.question: Can I edit my product listing?
items.answer: Yes! You can edit or delete your listings anytime from your Dashboard. Changes take effect immediately.

items.question: What if I have an issue with an order?
items.answer: Contact our support team through the Help Center or WhatsApp. We're available Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM WAT.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Delivery times depend on your location and the seller's location. Most deliveries in Katsina metropolis take 2-3 business days.

items.question: What if I receive a defective product?
items.answer: Report the issue to the seller or our support team within 7 days of delivery. We'll help resolve the issue or arrange a refund.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Katsina Online Business (KOB) uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience and improve our services.

what.heading: 1. What Are Cookies?
what.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us remember your preferences and improve your experience.

types.heading: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
types.intro: We use the following types of cookies:
items: Session Cookies: Temporary cookies that expire when you close your browser
Persistent Cookies: Cookies that remain on your device for a specified period
Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how you use our website (Google Analytics)
Authentication Cookies: Help keep you logged in to your account
Preference Cookies: Remember your language and display preferences

purpose.heading: 3. Purpose of Cookies
items: Maintaining your logged-in session
Remembering your preferences and settings
Analyzing website traffic and user behavior
Improving website functionality and performance
Personalizing your experience

third_party.heading: 4. Third-Party Cookies
third_party.content: We do not use third-party cookies for advertising or tracking purposes. Any third-party services we use (such as Firebase for authentication and analytics) may set their own cookies in accordance with their privacy policies.

control.heading: 5. Cookie Control
control.intro: You can control cookies through your browser settings:
items: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
Firefox: Preferences → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
Edge: Settings → Privacy → Cookies and site data
control.note: Please note that disabling cookies may affect your ability to use certain features of our website.

updates.heading: 6. Changes to This Policy
updates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "last updated" date.

contact.heading: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about our cookie practices, please contact us through our Help page or WhatsApp.

acceptance.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Katsina Online Business (KOB), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.

responsibilities.heading: 2. Seller Responsibilities
items: Provide accurate and complete product descriptions
Deliver products as described or refund buyers
Respond to buyer inquiries within 24 hours
Handle all payment and delivery arrangements directly with buyers
Maintain professional communication with all users
Comply with all applicable Nigerian laws and regulations

product_listings.heading: 3. Product Listings
items: Listing only products they own and have legal right to sell
Providing clear, high-quality product images
Setting fair and competitive prices
Accurately describing product condition and specifications
Updating listings promptly when products are sold or unavailable

prohibited.heading: 4. Prohibited Items and Activities
prohibited.intro: The following items and activities are strictly prohibited:
items: Illegal drugs, weapons, or controlled substances
Counterfeit or stolen goods
Items that infringe on intellectual property rights
Adult content or services
Items that promote violence, hate, or discrimination
Fraudulent or misleading listings
Items banned by Nigerian law

liability.heading: 5. Liability Disclaimer
liability.content: KOB acts as a platform connecting buyers and sellers. We are not responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of products sold through our platform. All transactions are conducted directly between buyers and sellers. KOB shall not be liable for any damages, losses, or disputes arising from transactions on our platform.

dispute_resolution.heading: 6. Dispute Resolution
dispute_resolution.content: In case of disputes between buyers and sellers, users agree to attempt resolution through direct communication first. If resolution cannot be reached, users may contact KOB support for mediation. KOB's decision in dispute resolution is final.

changes.heading: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified of significant changes via email or platform announcements. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

contact.heading: 8. Contact Information
contact.content: For questions about these terms, please contact us:
